releaseNotes:
v0.24.7 — Split container + external inventory CSV import.

Split container: bulk-repackaging workflow. New button in Edit Bottle dialog (visible when quantity > 1). Splits a 1000-tab Tylenol pack into 10 bottles of 100 in one dialog. Parent marks Pulled with audit note, N children inherit lot/expiry/zone.

External inventory CSV import: for pharmacies on existing systems (Liberty, Rx30, ComputerRx). Auto-detects common column names. Re-importing is safe. PHI guard rejects patient-shaped columns.
